iti3:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti3:2.1: “Abandon one quality, monks, and I guarantee you non-return.
iti3:2.4: Abandon delusion as the one quality, and I guarantee you non-return.”
iti3:3.2: beings go to a bad destination, confused:
iti3:3.4: those who see clearly let go.
iti3:3.5: Letting go, they never come to this world
